title: Bump to v5.2.1
body:
As the title says
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

```
Checking quay.io test image accessibility
    quay.io/libpod/alpine:latest
time="2024-08-14T12:44:20Z" level=fatal msg="Error parsing image name \"docker://quay.io/libpod/alpine:latest\": can't talk to a V1 container registry"
```
I think we should drop this check now given we mostly use a local registry now
cc @cevich @edsantiago
@mheon cirrus.yml DEST_BRANCH is not correct likely causing the bloat warnings as it compares against the wrong branch I think.

> I think we should drop this check now given we mostly use a local registry now cc @cevich @edsantiago

Agreed. We still can't live without quay, but this check here doesn't gain us anything. Context: https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/663833745389645823acf10362a098d73f9dd024/contrib/cirrus/prebuild.sh#L112-L119

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *lsm5*, *Luap99*, *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v5.2/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99,lsm5,mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

/hold cancel

Machine flaked, but should merge once that reruns
Restarting the Bud test but it didn't look like a flake to me.

> Restarting the Bud test but it didn't look like a flake to me.

It passed on https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/23606 so likely flake.
The machine test has failed 3 times in a row now. I think this isn't a flake.
